omniProcessElements.name: IP_SaveAssessmentResponse
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "IP_SaveAssessmentResponse", "integrationProcedureKey" : "Competency_SaveAssessmentResponse", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "omniProcessId" : "%omniProcessId%", "omniscriptId" : "%omniscriptId%", "Step1" : "%Step1%", "AssessmentEnvelopeItemId" : "%ContextId%", "Err_RunningContext" : "IP_SaveAssessmentResponse", "Err_CtxId" : "%ContextId%", "Err_ProcessType" : "IP", "AssessmentName" : "1.5 Certification of Competency (ISV Critical Care NP-PA)" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }

childElements.name: Core_Expectations_Acute_Care_Role_on_Intensivist_Team
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Functions within the acute care hospital and/or sub-acute/post-acute setting, working in collaboration with, and being an integral member of the Intensivist team. Primary role involves the care of acute and complex chronically ill patients 16 years of age and older by managing the day to day patient care from admission to discharge", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "A", "developerName" : "A", "value" : "A", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "B", "developerName" : "B", "value" : "B", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Medical_Record_Documentation_H_P_Progress_Notes_Transfer_and_Discharge
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Documents in the medical record a complete history and physical examination for acute and complex chronically ill patients upon initial admission/consultation and key components of patient's progress via daily progress note, transfer, and discharge summary", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "A", "developerName" : "A", "value" : "A", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "B", "developerName" : "B", "value" : "B", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Risk_Assessment_for_Acute_and_Complex_Patients
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Assesses for risks associated with the care of the acute and complex chronically ill patient including: medication side effects, immobility, impaired nutrition, fluid and electrolyte imbalance, immunocompetence, invasive interventions and diagnostic procedures", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "A", "developerName" : "A", "value" : "A", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "B", "developerName" : "B", "value" : "B", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: Step1
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "NURSE PRACTITIONER OR PHYSICIAN ASSISTANT CERTIFICATION OF COMPETENCY", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3.0, "nextLabel" : "Submit", "nextWidth" : 3.0, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000.0, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000.0, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : true, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }
